responses: Hello! Welcome to Pinnacle Labs support.
Hi there! How can I assist you today?
Good day! What can I help you with?
Goodbye! Feel free to reach out if you have more questions.
We offer comprehensive Data Science solutions, including Artificial Intelligence development, Machine Learning models, and Big Data Analytics.
Our services range from custom AI solutions to data-driven business intelligence. How can we help your business today?
We are available Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM.
Our working hours are 9 AM to 6 PM on weekdays.

patterns: Do you have an email address?
responses: You can reach us via email at contact@pinnaclelabs.com or call us at 1-800-PINNACLE.
Our main office is located in Tech Park. You can email us at contact@pinnaclelabs.com.

patterns: Tell me about the internship program
How do I apply for the internship?
responses: Our 2026 Internship Program offers hands-on experience in Data Science. You need to complete at least 1 out of 3 tasks (like building this chatbot!). Please check your internship guideline PDF for more details.
